failures.description: The Executor misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result. The returned item priced at $46.13 is above $45.76, but the agent answered that there were no matching items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the relevant tool output before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned count=1 with an available Jigsaw Puzzle, difficulty level beginner, price 46.13. The user asked for items costing more than $45.76, and 46.13 satisfies that condition. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 even approved the incorrect answer.
